title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat Build of Apache Camel 4.14.2.P1 for Spring Boot release.
overview:
Red Hat build of Apache Camel 4.14.2 for Spring Boot patch 1 release and security update is now available.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of
Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives
a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE
link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat build of Apache Camel 4.14.2.P1 for Spring Boot 3.5.9
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat Build of Apache Camel 4.14.2.P1 for Spring Boot release.

Red Hat build of Apache Camel 4.14.2 for Spring Boot patch 1 release and security update is now available.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of
Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives
a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE
link(s) in the References section.

Red Hat build of Apache Camel 4.14.2 for Spring Boot patch 1 release and security update is now available.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of
Important. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives
a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE
link(s) in the References section.



CVE-2025-66566: A flaw was found in lz4-java. This vulnerability allows disclosure of sensitive data via crafted compressed input due to insufficient clearing of the output buffer in Java-based decompressor implementations.
